anchors.vad_stop: actual user silence (VADUserStoppedSpeakingFrame timestamp minus vad stop_secs) -> turn release (UserStoppedSpeakingFrame). Includes the VAD silence window, STT finalization wait, and any turn-analyzer wait (strategy: vad_timeout).
anchors.stt_final: STT service TTFB reported by pipecat metrics during the user-stop -> bot-start cycle (time to first transcription byte). OFTEN NULL: streaming STT reports TTFB at the first partial, while the user is still speaking — outside the measured cycle. The STT finalization wait is already included in vad_stop (user_turn_secs).
anchors.llm_ttft: LLM service TTFB reported by pipecat metrics during the cycle (request start -> first streamed token).
anchors.tts_first_audio: TTS service TTFB reported by pipecat metrics during the cycle (synthesis request -> first audio byte).
anchors.voice_to_voice: UserBotLatencyObserver on_latency_measured: actual user silence (VAD stop_secs-adjusted) -> BotStartedSpeakingFrame. Observer clock — never comparable with eval-scenario within_ms budgets, which anchor on the harness's send (Pitfall 7).
